name: claude-faf-mcp
display_name: FAF - Persistent Project Context for AI
description: Persistent project context that survives sessions, works across AI tools, and eliminates re-explaining. IANA-registered format. 32 MCP tools. Desktop Extension.
long_description:
Persistent project context for AI. Tell Claude what you're building, who it's for, and why it matters. 30 seconds. It never forgets.

**What it does:**
- Scores your project's AI-readiness (0-100%)
- Creates project.faf — persistent context that survives every session
- Bi-syncs with CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, GEMINI.md
- Auto-detects your stack, frameworks, and architecture
- Extracts context from README or any GitHub repo

**No terminal required.** Tell Claude about your project and FAF handles the rest.

**Example prompts:**
- "Set up project context for this codebase" → creates project.faf, scores AI-readiness
- "What's my AI-readiness score?" → calculates 0-100% with tier (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Trophy)
- "Sync my .faf with CLAUDE.md" → bi-directional sync in 8ms
- "Generate a .faf from this GitHub repo: https://github.com/user/repo" → instant context from any public repo
- "Improve my score to Gold" → guided interview, adds missing context, re-scores

**IANA-registered format (application/vnd.faf+yaml). Merged in Anthropic MCP ecosystem (PR #2759). 36,000+ downloads.**

tools.name: faf_bi_sync
tools.description: Bi-directional sync to all AI formats

tools.name: faf_context
tools.description: Set or view active project context

tools.name: faf_auto
tools.description: Zero to AI context in one command

tools.name: faf_formats
tools.description: Discover all formats in your project

tools.name: faf_tri_sync
tools.description: Tri-sync .faf ↔ CLAUDE.md ↔ MEMORY.md — Pro feature, free for developers
